display.purpose: Page H1 and per-session H2. Read from a meter away.

title.purpose: Session card names. Truncate, never wrap.

body.purpose: Running prose, chat slot context, observer insight text.

label.purpose: Section labels and panel labels in mono uppercase.

micro.purpose: Badges, model tags, axis numbers; mono uppercase, ≤10px.

console.purpose: Terminal block body. The only mono-at-body-size in the system.

shadows.name: cta-ambient
shadows.purpose: Default state of the primary CTA. The only shadow in the system at rest.

shadows.name: cta-lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover state for the primary CTA, paired with a 1px translateY.

motion.name: swift
motion.purpose: Card border-color, button background, hover state changes.

motion.name: settled
motion.purpose: CTA hover shadow + lift. Maximum motion duration in the system.

breakpoints.name: single-column
breakpoints.purpose: Below this, the sidebar collapses inline above the detail pane.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: The single tall, indigo, shadowed action button. Used for one-decision-per-screen moments.
components.css: .ds-cta { display: block; width: 100%; background: #6366f1; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 22px 24px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.005em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px -10px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.5); transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-cta:hover { background: #4f52e0; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px -12px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.6); } .ds-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f52e0; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-cta-sub { display: block; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; opacity: 0.85; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Send Button
components.description: Compact 40x40 indigo square paired with a chat textarea.
components.css: .ds-send { width: 40px; height: 40px; background: #6366f1; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-send:hover { background: #4f52e0; } .ds-send:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4f52e0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-send:disabled { background: #d4d4dd; color: #6e6e7a; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Session Card
components.description: Sidebar inbox card. Selected state replaces hover; both signal with border + tint, never with shadow.
components.html:
claude-meta

sonnet 4.6

claude-code · 14s ago

items3 turns
tokens42k ctx · 1.8k out
components.css: .ds-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: #1a1a1f; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e7ec; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #6366f1; } .ds-card[data-selected] { border-color: #6366f1; background: #eef0fe; } .ds-card-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-card-head h3 { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0; letter-spacing: -0.01em; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-tag { font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6e6e7a; background: #f3f3f7; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 3px; } .ds-card-source { font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #6e6e7a; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-kv { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 11px; } .ds-k { font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; color: #9090a0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 10px; } .ds-v { color: #1a1a1f; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Detail-pane content frame. Generous padding; uppercase mono label inside.
components.html:
what happened so far

running summary lands in phase 3.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e7ec; border-radius: 12px; padding: 22px 24px; } .ds-panel-label { font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #9090a0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin: 0 0 10px; } .ds-prose { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: #1a1a1f; margin: 0; }

components.name: Terminal Block
components.description: The system's one dark surface. Frames the latest model output verbatim.
components.html: $ reading state, scanning tokens, drafting response. cache hit at turn 4.
components.css: .ds-terminal { background: #15151c; color: #e5e5ee; font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.65; padding: 18px 22px; border-radius: 10px; max-height: 360px; overflow-y: auto; margin: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; } .ds-prompt { color: #a8aafd; user-select: none; }

components.name: Chat Slot
components.description: Per-flagged-turn input. Textarea on Paper inside a Surface slot, with a 40x40 send square.
components.html: observer flagged: tool churn around the migration migration · tool-churn
components.css: .ds-chat { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e7ec; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 14px; } .ds-chat-context { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; color: #6e6e7a; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-chat-tags { font-family: ui-monospace, SF Mono, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #9090a0; margin-left: 6px; } .ds-chat-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: stretch; } .ds-chat-input { flex: 1; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid #d4d4dd; border-radius: 6px; resize: vertical; min-height: 40px; background: #fafafb; color: #1a1a1f; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-chat-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #6366f1; background: #ffffff; } .ds-send { width: 40px; height: 40px; background: #6366f1; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-send:hover { background: #4f52e0; }

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Dashed-outline empty placeholder. Italic Ink Soft prose, lowercase, never apologetic.
components.html: no active session detected, start claude code in a project
components.css: .ds-empty { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #6e6e7a; font-style: italic; text-align: center; padding: 32px 16px; border: 1px dashed #d4d4dd; border-radius: 12px; }

narrative.overview:
A console that watches several agents at once on a side monitor and almost never asks for attention. When something genuinely matters, it's unmistakable; the rest of the time, it sits like a status light on the desk: present, undemanding, glanceable from across the room.

The system inherits its texture from the terminal next to it. Mono type for anything the agent emits or that operates as a label; system sans only for the prose layer wrapped around it. The page is light, thin-bordered, mostly hairlines and quiet greys; saturation appears in two places only, the indigo signal that names the active agent, and the coral that flags the latest turn worth looking at. Dark surfaces appear exactly once, in the terminal block, where the text is literally being echoed from a process.

This explicitly rejects: dashboard density, hero-metric SaaS templates, AI-app aesthetics, corporate landing-page chrome, and notification-bait.
keyCharacteristics: Light surface, hairline borders, almost no shadow
Saturated color used under 10% of any view, in two roles only (indigo = signal; coral = latest)
Type hierarchy carried by mono for instruments, sans for prose
Density rhythm: tight inside cards, generous between sections
Flat by default; the only colored shadow in the system is on the primary CTA

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Indigo is the agent's voice. It appears on the active output bar, the selected session card, the primary CTA, and the send button. Nothing else. Never use indigo as a divider, a hover tint on an unrelated surface, a heading underline, or decoration.

rules.name: The Latest-Only Coral Rule
rules.body: Coral marks the most recent turn of the currently-viewed session in the detail-pane complexity chart, and nowhere else. The moment a newer turn arrives, the prior coral bar reverts to indigo. Coral does not appear in chrome, alerts, badges, copy, or anywhere outside that single chart. Its scarcity is the entire point: at any moment, coral paints in at most one place on the page. Sidebar cards do not carry charts; if they ever do, this rule extends to freshest-session-only across the inbox.

rules.name: The Data-Color Quarantine Rule
rules.body: Diff Green and Diff Red live inside the code-changes chart only. They are not in the design system; they are in the chart. Do not extend them into status pills, success/error toasts, or any other UI surface.

rules.name: The Two-Stack Rule
rules.body: Sans for prose, mono for instruments. The contrast between them is the entire type system; do not add a third family, an italic display, or a script. Hierarchy comes from scale and weight inside each stack.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Chrome Rule
rules.body: When something is in mono on the light surface, it is operating as instrumentation: a label, a tag, an axis, a key, an elapsed time. Body prose is sans even when it describes mono concepts. The terminal block is the one exception: there, mono is the content because the underlying source is.

rules.name: The All-Caps Stays Tiny Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracking is reserved for ≤12px labels. Headings are mixed case at sentence weight. There is no uppercase H1, H2, or button label anywhere in the system.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface lifts unless it is the primary call to action. Cards, panels, chat slots, the terminal, observer insights all sit flush. If you find yourself reaching for a shadow to make something pop, step back: the answer is contrast, border weight, or removing whatever is competing with it.

rules.name: The Tinted-Shadow Rule
rules.body: When a shadow does appear, it carries the surface's hue, not pure black. The CTA shadow is rgba indigo, not rgba neutral. Pure-black shadows on a tinted-neutral page read as cheap.

dos: Do carry indigo as the agent's one voice. If you're tempted to add an indigo divider, indigo heading, or indigo decoration somewhere outside the active turn, selected card, CTA, or send button, reach for Pewter or Hairline instead.
Do keep coral reserved for this just happened, exclusively the latest turn's output bar in the complexity chart.
Do use mono for every label, axis, tag, key, elapsed time, and badge; sans for prose. Mono signals instrumentation.
Do use 1px hairline borders to separate cards, panels, charts. The borders are the structure.
Do keep dashed borders for empty states and intra-panel subdivisions only.
Do stay flat. If you reach for a shadow, ask whether contrast or whitespace would do the work instead. The CTA's tinted shadow is the only shadow in the system, and it earned its place.
Do render the code-changes chart only when there's something to render. An empty chart is worse than no chart.
Do keep the terminal block as the one dark surface in any view. If a second dark surface appears, the design has drifted.
Do write all UI copy in lowercase, in the dry-with-a-wink voice.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards, panels, callouts, alerts, or list items. The current observer-insight does this and is in violation; do not propagate the pattern, and rewrite that one element with a full border and background tint instead.
Don't introduce gradient text, glassmorphism, or pure black or pure white neutrals. Use the named neutrals; they are tinted toward the page hue on purpose.
Don't ship the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't ship Datadog or Grafana density (rows of identical panels, gauges-because-gauges).
Don't ship AI-app aesthetic (gradient blobs, pastel calm tones, sparkle copy, your-AI-assistant tone).
Don't bring back severity badges, side-stripe alert cards, or sidebars-of-sidebars.
Don't ship notification-bait: pulsing dots, growing counters, color-changing favicon, attention animations when nothing has actually changed.
Don't add a third button type. Primary CTA and send button cover every action.
Don't capitalize headings, badge text, or button labels.
Don't animate layout properties. State changes use opacity and transform only; transitions cap at 200ms with an ease-out curve.
Don't extend Diff Green or Diff Red beyond the code-changes chart. They are data colors, not status colors.
